evidence_quotes.quote: video games and how many companies are revoking consumers' rights to own the products they've purchased.
targeted at minors and vulnerable people.

paragraphs.text: I think the goals of the Digital Fairness act are absolutely worth pursuing, I stand by it completely. The businesses taking advantage of vulnerable people and consumers in general with these shady practices need to be stopped. I believe in addition to the goals stated in the initiative that others here are correct with regards to video games and how many companies are revoking consumers' rights to own the products they've purchased. I would also like to add that I believe the Digital Fairness Act could extend to the completely pervasive use of AI and Large Language Models across the internet which has completely flooded social media platforms with easily producible (and easily digested) misinformation and harmful content, especially when targeted at minors and vulnerable people. I believe that if the DFA included such uses of AI under its protections of consumers then we would all be the better for it.
